prompt: Using the uploaded reference photo for the face, generate a sun-drenched, high-contrast candid shot captured on 35mm film. The image shows a street artist from a back-view perspective creating a grand masterpiece. The artist stands at the base of a towering concrete wall, adding brushstrokes to a massive, photorealistic mural of the woman from the reference image, keeping her face identical. The giant portrait is integrated into the wall, wearing a custom casual street wear. Vibrant explosions of Color 1 and Color 2 paint splatters radiate across the textured canvas. The ground is cluttered with used paint cans and colorful spills. Natural, warm golden hour sunlight rakes across the wall, casting a soft rim light. Shallow depth of field, sharp focus, rich cinematic color grade.
